releases.author: senjanson
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Fixed synchronization functionality and restored conditional loading of the ws module
- Fixed related bugs in sync process
- Updated manifest for desktop and mobile compatibility
- Enhanced error handling in peer addition and improved network interface management
